what_it_does: Records metadata for a channel attachment that links a board item to the dragnet-development channel.
observations: YAML frontmatter only, no body content
standouts: References a board item via a board:// URI scheme
Contains only header metadata with no explanatory content
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter for attachment metadata
concerns: File provides no context about the referenced board item beyond its URI
notes: A bare attachment record that points the dragnet-development channel at board item item-86ef3dca.
questions: What is the content or purpose of board item item-86ef3dca?
Is this attachment intended to remain metadata-only, or should it include a summary of the board item?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated attachment_type board_items matches the metadata link, but the actual file contains only the header and not the referenced board item content.
intention_signals: Catalog a reference from the dragnet-development channel to a specific board item so it can be indexed or retrieved by attachment id.
contribution: Provides a stable, timestamped pointer associating the dragnet-development channel with board item item-86ef3dca.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-frontmatter attachment record (att-26270626) of type board_items linking the dragnet-development channel to board item item-86ef3dca, with no body content.
intention_for_embedding: To record that a board item is attached to the dragnet-development channel at a specific time.
